entry.title: Welcome to my new blog!
entry.content:
Introduction

Welcome to my new blog. This is where I will share my malware analysis reports, reverse engineering labs, and CTF writeups.

Features

This blog features a custom design with:

  • Dark mode optimized for reading code.
  • 3-column layout implementation.
  • Syntax highlighting for code blocks.
  • Integrated table of contents.

Malware Analysis

I will be posting detailed reports on recent malware samples I have analyzed.

CTF Writeups

Expect writeups for platforms like HackTheBox, TryHackMe, and various CTF competitions.

Stay Tuned

Follow me on social media to get notified of new posts.
entry.summary: Introduction Welcome to my new blog. This is where I will share my malware analysis reports, reverse engineering labs, and CTF writeups. Features This blog features a custom design with: Dark mode optimized for reading code. 3-column layout implementation. Syntax highlighting for code blocks. Integrated table of contents. Malware Analysis I will be posting detailed reports on recent malware samples I have analyzed. CTF Writeups Expect writeups for platforms like HackTheBox, TryHackMe, and various CTF competitions. Stay Tuned Follow me on social media to get notified of new posts.
